title: Juleries
description: Adds FEATURES and IMPROVEMENTS without *drastically* changing the vanilla Minecraft experience.
body:
### What is this?
The core idea was to improve and add to the classic minecraft experience, but not too excessively for it to become totally different & unrecognizable!

### Why?
This Modpack was originally made for a playthrough with my friends, but decided to upload it for easier access and for others to try it out aswell!

![Landscape Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb58c82885b3f98e319ab9b45010667034deedb4.png)

# TOP FEATURES

### Items:
- New Weapons & armors!
- New craftable items!

### Mobs:
- New animals & monsters!
- New variations of vanilla mobs!

### World:
- New biomes & structures!
- Remastered vanilla biomes & structures!
- New attack animations!
- Remastered & new sounds!

### Other:
- Essential mod included! (multiplayer mod)
- Shaders included! (optional)
- Quality of life improvements and performance fixes! (QOL)
#

![Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4fd538a919fe11d5d9affc5354c7b1b7514edf4.png)
#

_**The contents of this Modpack are NOT MADE BY ME!**_
